step_rationale: Amino acid metabolite with complex roles in immune regulation and systemic metabolic stress; not direct atherothrombotic pathway molecule.
mechanism: Tryptophan metabolism dysregulation associates with immune dysbalance and heightened atherosclerotic inflammation in MI risk, operating through systemic pathways.
